//: Pipeline-entry hook. Merge into the project .claude/settings.json. A UserPromptSubmit hook injects the omc-pipeline.md directive into context on EVERY prompt, so OMC deterministically enters the pipeline. This is steering (guarantees the directive is present), not a hard gate (does not guarantee obedience) — the gates.md gate stack is the backstop.

hooks.command: echo 'PIPELINE: this repo follows omc-pipeline.md — begin any build request with deep-interview, then run the autonomous ralplan -> ultragoal create-goals -> complete-goals chain, driving loop.md per slice with the gates.md gate stack as definition-of-done. No approval pause after the interview.'
